definitions.text: vise romantisk oppmerksomhet til en annen person
definitions.translation: show romantic attention to another person

examples.no: den unge mannen gjorde kur til datteren i huset
examples.en: the young man was courting the daughter of the house

definitions.text: forsøke å innynde seg hos noen
definitions.translation: try to ingratiate oneself with someone

examples.en: the prime minister courted the opposition
